tasks.label: Rebuild amwall (clean + release, stderr → swaplog.txt)
tasks.command: chcp 65001 >nul && cargo clean && cargo build --release && cargo run --release 1> "${workspaceFolder}\swaplog.txt" 2>&1

tasks.label: Build + run amwall ELEVATED (UAC, stderr → swaplog.txt)
tasks.detail: Builds in release, then launches amwall.exe via UAC. The elevated cmd.exe wrapper handles stderr redirection (Start-Process -Verb RunAs can't redirect stdio directly). Helper script: .vscode/run-elevated.ps1

tasks.label: amwall: ensure cargo-wix
args: if (-not (Get-Command cargo-wix -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { Write-Host 'Installing cargo-wix...'; cargo install cargo-wix --locked } else { Write-Host 'cargo-wix already installed' }

tasks.label: Build MSI installer
args: if (-not (Get-Command candle.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { Write-Error 'WiX Toolset 3.x not found on PATH. Install via:`n  choco install wixtoolset -y  (run from an elevated shell)`nor download from https://github.com/wixtoolset/wix3/releases'; exit 1 }; $v = (Select-String -Path Cargo.toml -Pattern '^version = "(.+)"').Matches[0].Groups[1].Value; $tb = 'target\x86_64-pc-windows-msvc\release'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path target\wix -Force | Out-Null; candle.exe -nologo "-dVersion=$v" "-dCargoTargetBinDir=$tb" -ext WixUIExtension -out target\wix\main.wixobj wix\main.wxs; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit 1 }; $locs = Get-ChildItem wix\lang\*.wxl | ForEach-Object { '-loc'; $_.FullName }; $cultures = (Get-ChildItem wix\lang\*.wxl | ForEach-Object { $_.BaseName }) -join ';'; light.exe -nologo -ext WixUIExtension -out "target\wix\amwall-$v-x86_64.msi" "-cultures:$cultures" @locs target\wix\main.wixobj; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { $msi = Get-ChildItem -Path target/wix -Filter *.msi | Select-Object -Last 1; if ($msi) { Write-Host "`nMSI built: $($msi.FullName)" -ForegroundColor Green } }

tasks.label: Reveal MSI in Explorer
args: $msi = Get-ChildItem -Path target/wix -Filter *.msi -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Last 1; if ($msi) { Start-Process explorer.exe -ArgumentList "/select,$($msi.FullName)" } else { Write-Error 'No MSI found under target/wix - run "Build MSI installer" first.' }
